source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the UC- 1 Zone Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the UC- 1 Zone Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the UC- 1 Zone Applicability
provisions.text: With the exception of main buildings within a heritage conservation district, any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any main building, within the UC- 1 zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Sections 103 and 104, and Part X, any main building shall

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Sections 103 and 104, and Part X, any main building shall
provisions.text: Subject to Sections 103 and 104, and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 285(2), any portion of a main building,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 285(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 285(2), any portion of a main building, either above or below grade, shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18. (RCCC- Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 285(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: If a minimum required front or flanking setback has not been specified on Schedule 18, the minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 3.0 metres. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22) Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum required side setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK zone, 6.0 metres from the side lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC- Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: 2.5 metres elsewhere.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum side setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any side yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: For any high-rise building, any portion of the main building above the streetwall height shall have a minimum required setback from any side lot line of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: 6.0 metres, if the abutting property is within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, UC- 2, or UC-1 zone and has a view plane restriction that would not permit the development of a high-rise building; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: 12.5 metres elsewhere.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 286(2) and 286(3), the minimum
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK zone, 6.0 metres from the rear lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC- Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: 3.0 metres elsewhere.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum rear setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any rear yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: For any high-rise building, any portion of the main building above the streetwall height shall have a minimum required setback from any rear lot line of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: 6.0 metres, if the abutting property is within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, UC- 2, or UC-1 zone and has a view plane restriction that would not permit the development of a high-rise building; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 287(2) and 287(3), the minimum
provisions.text: 12.5 metres elsewhere. Maximum Streetwall Heights

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main building's maximum required streetwall height shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: on a registered heritage property, the streetwall height of the registered heritage building on the coming into force date of this By-law; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: 14.0 metres elsewhere.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: On a site having sloping conditions, the maximum streetwall height required in Subsection 288(1), may be exceeded by:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: 10%, where any main building is located on a streetline or a transportation reserve that has an average finished grade that results in a slope that is between 4% and 8% across the entire width of the streetwall; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: 20%, where any main building is located on a streetline or a transportation reserve that has an average finished grade that results in a slope that exceeds 8% across the entire width of the streetwall.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: Excluding any high-rise building, no maximum required streetwall height applies if any main building is set back no less than 40.0 metres from a front or flanking lot line.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 288(2), 288(3), and 288(4), any main
provisions.text: The maximum required streetwall height may be exceeded by 1.5 metres to permit a clear glass guard and railing system or a parapet. Minimum Streetwall Heights

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main building's minimum required streetwall height shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: along pedestrian-oriented commercial streets, as shown on Schedule 7, 8.0 metres; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: along all other streets or transportation reserves:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: for any main building less than 8.0 metres in height, the building height, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: 8.0 metres elsewhere.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: Twenty percent or less of the entire streetwall width, to a maximum of 10.0 metres, may be reduced in height, providing the height is not reduced below 3.5 metres (Diagram 7). (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: The minimum streetwall height required in Subsection 289(1) may be reduced to 3.5 metres along a streetline or a transportation reserve, if the slope exceeds 4% across the building width or building depth. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 289(2), 289(3), and 289(4), any main
provisions.text: Excluding any tall mid-rise building or a high-rise building, no minimum required streetwall height applies if the building is set back no less than 40.0 metres from a front or flanking lot line. Streetwall Stepbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a minimum required streetwall stepback of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: 2.0 metres for mid-rise buildings; (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: 3.0 metres for tall mid-rise buildings; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: 4.5 metres for high-rise buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: No streetwall stepback is required for a maximum of 20% of the length of any main building facing each streetline or a transportation reserve provided that:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: each section not having a streetwall stepback does not exceed 14.0 metres in length along the streetline or transportation reserve; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: there is a minimum required separation distance of 14.0 metres along the streetline or transportation reserve between sections not having a streetwall stepback. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 290(2), any main building shall have a
provisions.text: No portion of any main building above the streetwall shall project beyond the streetwall towards the front or flanking lot line. Recessed Portions and Cantilevers within Streetwalls

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 291(2), the total combined width of all

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 291(2), the total combined width of all
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 291(2), the total combined width of all cantilevered and recessed portions within any streetwall that have a depth of 2.0 metres or greater shall not exceed 30% of the width of the streetwall.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 291(2), the total combined width of all
provisions.text: Cantilevered and recessed portions described in Subsection 291(1) shall include portals, but exclude balconies and recessed pedestrian entrances. Maximum Lot Coverage

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot coverage shall be 60% for the entire grouping of properties that make up each of the following special areas, as shown on Schedule 3D:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 1 (UCLC-1);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 2 (UCLC-2);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 3 (UCLC-3);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 4 (UCLC-4);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 5 (UCLC-5);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 6 (UCLC-6);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 7 (UCLC-7);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 8 (UCLC-8); and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: UC Lot Coverage 9 (UCLC-9).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 292(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Ground Floor Requirements

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series Highways, as shown on Schedule 52, a ground floor shall be established along any streetline or transportation reserve. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: On a corner lot, for any streetwall along a streetline or transportation reserve that has an average finished grade that exceeds a slope greater than 8%, extended across the entire width of the streetwall, the requirements for a ground floor do not apply.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: A ground floor shall have a minimum required depth of 3.0 metres, as measured from any exterior wall of any main building that is facing a streetline or a transportation reserve.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 293(6), each ground floor required shall, for no less than 70% of each streetwall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: subject to Section 74, commence no lower than 0.6 metre below the streetline grade; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: subject to Subsection 293(5), commence no higher than 0.6 metre above the streetline grade.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: In the event of a conflict between the coastal elevation requirements of Section 74 and Clause 293(4)(b), Clause 293(4)(b) shall not apply.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: The ground floor of a grade-related dwelling unit use shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: subject to Section 74, commence no lower than 1.5 metres below the streetline grade; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: commence no higher than 1.5 metres above the streetline grade.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 293(8), the minimum required ground floor height shall be 3.5 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: The ground floor height required in Subsection 293(7) may be reduced where one of the following conditions applies:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: the ground floor height of an addition is equal to or greater than the ground floor height of the existing main building; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 293(2) and excluding 100-Series
provisions.text: for a proposed main building on a registered heritage property, the ground floor heights of abutting main buildings along the same streetline are such that the required ground floor height of the proposed main building would be inconsistent with the abutting main buildings. Side and Rear Stepbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any portion of the building above the height of the streetwall shall have a minimum required:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: side stepback of 2.5 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: rear stepback of 4.5 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 294(4), where a lot abuts another lot, any portion of which, is zoned ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK zone, the wall of any main building facing the lot with such zone shall have a required side or rear stepback at a height between 6.0 metres and 11.0 metres, as measured from the lowest finished grade on that side of the main building. (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: The side or rear stepback in Subsection 294(2) shall be a minimum of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 0.0 metre for low-rise buildings;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 2.0 metres for mid-rise buildings; (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 6.0 metres for tall mid-rise buildings; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 6.0 metres for high-rise buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: The side or rear stepbacks under Subsections 294(1) and 294(2) are not required if an entire main building has a minimum side or rear setback of: (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 8.0 metres for mid-rise buildings; (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 12.0 metres for tall mid-rise buildings; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 294(2), for any tall mid-rise building, any
provisions.text: 12.0 metres for high-rise buildings. Minimum Separation Distances

sections.title_label_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in Subsection 89(3), a minimum required separation distance of 4.0 metres shall be provided between main buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: Where more than one portion of any main building protrudes above grade, a minimum required separation distance of 4.0 metres shall be provided between the above grade portions.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: Above the streetwall height, any portions of the same main building shall be separated by a minimum required distance of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: 6.0 metres between a mid-rise typology and another mid- rise typology;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: 6.0 metres between a mid-rise typology and a tall mid-rise typology;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: 12.5 metres between a mid-rise typology and a high-rise typology;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: 12.5 metres between a tall mid-rise typology and another tall mid-rise typology;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: 12.5 metres between a tall mid-rise typology and a high- rise typology; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: 25.0 metres between a high-rise typology and another high-rise typology. (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding pedways or tunnels, where more than one main
provisions.text: Tower portions of two or more main buildings on the same lot shall be separated by a minimum required distance of 25.0 metres. (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22) Maximum Building Dimensions

sections.title_label_raw: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the

provisions.heading_context_raw: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the
provisions.text: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the following maximum building dimension requirements of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the
provisions.text: a building depth of 35.0 metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the
provisions.text: a building width of 40.0 metres; and (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the
provisions.text: an average floor area of 900 square metres per storey as calculated for the tower portion of the building. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The tower portion of any high-rise building shall not exceed the
provisions.text: For the purpose of measuring building dimensions in Subsection 296(1), main buildings connected by a pedway shall be measured separately, excluding the pedway. Accessory Structures and Shipping Containers

sections.title_label_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the
provisions.text: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter 19.
